nasb.text: Departing, they began going throughout the villages, preaching the gospel and healing everywhere.

esv.text: And they departed and went through the villages, preaching the gospel and healing everywhere.

cnv.text: 於是他們就出去，走遍各鄉，傳講福音，到處醫治病人。

ccb.text: 使徒领命出发，走遍各个乡村，到处宣扬福音，替人治病。

csbs.text: 使徒们就出去，走遍各村庄到处传福音，使人痊愈。
